title: centaurella autumnalis var. aestivalis
intro: Centaurella autumnalis var. aestivalis, also known as a perennial herb, is a variety of the Centaurella autumnalis plant, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurella autumnalis var. aestivalis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
